translation.tag: 1. Printer homes and probes the bed
translation.en: 1. Printer homes and probes the bed

translation.tag: 1. Printer will home and probe each screw
translation.en: 1. Printer will home and probe each screw

translation.tag: 2. Place paper between nozzle and bed
translation.en: 2. Place paper between nozzle and bed

translation.tag: 2. Results show how much to turn each screw
translation.en: 2. Results show how much to turn each screw

translation.tag: 3. Adjust screws, then re-probe to verify
translation.en: 3. Adjust screws, then re-probe to verify

translation.tag: 3. Lower nozzle until paper drags slightly
translation.en: 3. Lower nozzle until paper drags slightly

translation.tag: 4. Paper should move but with resistance
translation.en: 4. Paper should move but with resistance

translation.tag: Adjustments stay active until restart. Save after print completes.
translation.en: Adjustments stay active until restart. Save after print completes.

translation.tag: Adjusts individual characteristics of your heaters for optimal control
translation.en: Adjusts individual characteristics of your heaters for optimal control

translation.tag: After running the commands, tap Check Again below.
translation.en: After running the commands, tap Check Again below.

translation.tag: Allow display to sleep during active prints
translation.en: Allow display to sleep during active prints

translation.tag: Already connecting — wait a moment and try again
translation.en: Already connecting — wait a moment and try again

translation.tag: Always show Android navigation bar instead of using gestures
translation.en: Always show Android navigation bar instead of using gestures

translation.tag: An accelerometer was detected on your printer.
translation.en: An accelerometer was detected on your printer.

translation.tag: An error occurred while loading filament.
translation.en: An error occurred while loading filament.

translation.tag: Anonymous data to help improve HelixScreen
translation.en: Anonymous data to help improve HelixScreen

translation.tag: Anonymous stats — no personal data, ever.
translation.en: Anonymous stats — no personal data, ever.

translation.tag: Are you sure you want to cancel this print? All progress will be lost.
translation.en: Are you sure you want to cancel this print? All progress will be lost.

translation.tag: Are you sure? This will power off or restart the printer host.
translation.en: Are you sure? This will power off or restart the printer host.

translation.tag: Are you sure? This will power off or restart this device.
translation.en: Are you sure? This will power off or restart this device.

translation.tag: Assign Klipper macros to control LEDs via on/off, toggle, or presets
translation.en: Assign Klipper macros to control LEDs via on/off, toggle, or presets

translation.tag: Assign a role to enable sensor monitoring
translation.en: Assign a role to enable sensor monitoring

translation.tag: Auto-probe or manually check screw heights
translation.en: Auto-probe or manually check screw heights

translation.tag: Bluetooth is not available on this device
translation.en: Bluetooth is not available on this device

translation.tag: Body text supports longer guidance while staying readable.
translation.en: Body text supports longer guidance while staying readable.

translation.tag: Brightness level when LEDs turn on at startup
translation.en: Brightness level when LEDs turn on at startup

translation.tag: Browse guides, configuration references, and troubleshooting resources for HelixScreen.
translation.en: Browse guides, configuration references, and troubleshooting resources for HelixScreen.

translation.tag: Calibrate input shaping to reduce ringing artifacts in prints
translation.en: Calibrate input shaping to reduce ringing artifacts in prints

translation.tag: Calibrate your touchscreen for accurate input
translation.en: Calibrate your touchscreen for accurate input

translation.tag: Calibrate, tune jitter and scroll feel
translation.en: Calibrate, tune jitter and scroll feel

translation.tag: Calibration failed - touch targets more precisely.
translation.en: Calibration failed - touch targets more precisely.

translation.tag: Calibration may still be running — response timed out
translation.en: Calibration may still be running — response timed out

translation.tag: Calibration move may still be running — response timed out
translation.en: Calibration move may still be running — response timed out

translation.tag: Calibration saved but cannot apply on SDL display
translation.en: Calibration saved but cannot apply on SDL display

translation.tag: Calibration timed out. Please try again.
translation.en: Calibration timed out. Please try again.

translation.tag: Can't connect — try forgetting and re-pairing the printer
translation.en: Can't connect — try forgetting and re-pairing the printer

translation.tag: Cannot control timelapse: printer not connected
translation.en: Cannot control timelapse: printer not connected

translation.tag: Cannot delete file: printer not connected
translation.en: Cannot delete file: printer not connected

translation.tag: Cannot modify G-code: no temp directory available
translation.en: Cannot modify G-code: no temp directory available

translation.tag: Cannot modify G-code: scan result not available
translation.en: Cannot modify G-code: scan result not available

translation.tag: Cannot modify G-code: {}. Printing original file.
translation.en: Cannot modify G-code: {}. Printing original file.

translation.tag: Cannot reprint: not connected to printer
translation.en: Cannot reprint: not connected to printer

translation.tag: Cannot start print: not connected to printer
translation.en: Cannot start print: not connected to printer

translation.tag: Cartographer scan calibrate sent — use Z-Offset panel to adjust
translation.en: Cartographer scan calibrate sent — use Z-Offset panel to adjust

translation.tag: Chamber heater not found in printer configuration
translation.en: Chamber heater not found in printer configuration

translation.tag: Change LED color based on printer state
translation.en: Change LED color based on printer state

translation.tag: Changes apply immediately. Adjust during print for tuning.
translation.en: Changes apply immediately. Adjust during print for tuning.

translation.tag: Changes are temporary and reset on printer reboot
translation.en: Changes are temporary and reset on printer reboot

translation.tag: Changes can be reversed anytime using the Macro Viewer.
translation.en: Changes can be reversed anytime using the Macro Viewer.

translation.tag: Check the filament path and try again.
translation.en: Check the filament path and try again.

translation.tag: Check your heater's rating (typically 40-60W for hotends)
translation.en: Check your heater's rating (typically 40-60W for hotends)

translation.tag: Choose an existing filament, or tap + New to create one.
translation.en: Choose an existing filament, or tap + New to create one.

translation.tag: Choose how frames are captured during printing
translation.en: Choose how frames are captured during printing

translation.tag: Choose rendering mode for G-code visualization
translation.en: Choose rendering mode for G-code visualization

translation.tag: Choose rendering mode for bed mesh visualization
translation.en: Choose rendering mode for bed mesh visualization

translation.tag: Choose what to power off or restart.
translation.en: Choose what to power off or restart.

translation.tag: Cleared from settings — system unpair failed, may need OS Bluetooth
translation.en: Cleared from settings — system unpair failed, may need OS Bluetooth

translation.tag: Closer = more squish | Farther = less squish
translation.en: Closer = more squish | Farther = less squish

translation.tag: Collect logs and system info for support
translation.en: Collect logs and system info for support

translation.tag: Configure Spoolman integration and weight sync settings.
translation.en: Configure Spoolman integration and weight sync settings.

translation.tag: Configure WiFi for this device, or skip if you're using Ethernet
translation.en: Configure WiFi for this device, or skip if you're using Ethernet

translation.tag: Configure quick buttons and standard macros
translation.en: Configure quick buttons and standard macros

translation.tag: Connect a USB label printer first
translation.en: Connect a USB label printer first

translation.tag: Connect an ADXL345 accelerometer to calibrate
translation.en: Connect an ADXL345 accelerometer to calibrate

translation.tag: Connect to your printer via SSH and run:
translation.en: Connect to your printer via SSH and run:

translation.tag: Connection failed. Check IP/port and try again.
translation.en: Connection failed. Check IP/port and try again.

translation.tag: Connection must be tested successfully to continue
translation.en: Connection must be tested successfully to continue

translation.tag: Control power relays and smart outlets
translation.en: Control power relays and smart outlets

translation.tag: Could not analyze PRINT_START macro. Some print options may be unavailable.
translation.en: Could not analyze PRINT_START macro. Some print options may be unavailable.

translation.tag: Could not check webcam status.\nCheck printer connection.
translation.en: Could not check webcam status.\nCheck printer connection.

translation.tag: Could not verify Spoolman status. Moonraker may still be restarting.
translation.en: Could not verify Spoolman status. Moonraker may still be restarting.

translation.tag: Dead zone in pixels (raise if taps register as swipes; 0 disables)
translation.en: Dead zone in pixels (raise if taps register as swipes; 0 disables)

translation.tag: Dev channel requires dev_url in config
translation.en: Dev channel requires dev_url in config

translation.tag: Do not power off your printer.
translation.en: Do not power off your printer.

translation.tag: Do not touch the printer during calibration
translation.en: Do not touch the printer during calibration

translation.tag: Draw a ripple at each touch — helps diagnose offsets
translation.en: Draw a ripple at each touch — helps diagnose offsets

translation.tag: Each fan can only be selected once
translation.en: Each fan can only be selected once

translation.tag: Empty slots disable the associated functionality
translation.en: Empty slots disable the associated functionality

translation.tag: Enable WiFi to scan for networks
translation.en: Enable WiFi to scan for networks

translation.tag: Enter a name for your custom theme:
translation.en: Enter a name for your custom theme:

translation.tag: Enter a name to save this profile
translation.en: Enter a name to save this profile

translation.tag: Enter the IP address and port of your Spoolman server.
translation.en: Enter the IP address and port of your Spoolman server.

translation.tag: Escalate to emergency stop if cancel doesn't respond
translation.en: Escalate to emergency stop if cancel doesn't respond

translation.tag: Events appear here after sessions and prints
translation.en: Events appear here after sessions and prints

translation.tag: Explore how the selected palette shapes text, controls, and status colors.
translation.en: Explore how the selected palette shapes text, controls, and status colors.

translation.tag: Extrude may still be running — response timed out
translation.en: Extrude may still be running — response timed out

translation.tag: Extruder heats automatically based on material
translation.en: Extruder heats automatically based on material

translation.tag: Failed to download G-code for modification: {}
translation.en: Failed to download G-code for modification: {}

translation.tag: Failed to download helixscreen.conf.\nCheck printer connection.
translation.en: Failed to download helixscreen.conf.\nCheck printer connection.

translation.tag: Failed to download moonraker.conf.\nCheck printer connection.
translation.en: Failed to download moonraker.conf.\nCheck printer connection.

translation.tag: Failed to load fan configuration screen
translation.en: Failed to load fan configuration screen

translation.tag: Failed to load fan control overlay
translation.en: Failed to load fan control overlay

translation.tag: Failed to load print tune panel
translation.en: Failed to load print tune panel

translation.tag: Failed to read config. Check connection.
translation.en: Failed to read config. Check connection.

translation.tag: Failed to update configuration.\nCheck printer connection.
translation.en: Failed to update configuration.\nCheck printer connection.

translation.tag: Failed to update moonraker.conf.\nCheck printer connection.
translation.en: Failed to update moonraker.conf.\nCheck printer connection.

translation.tag: Filament diameter sensors for flow compensation
translation.en: Filament diameter sensors for flow compensation

translation.tag: Filament runout and motion detection sensors
translation.en: Filament runout and motion detection sensors

translation.tag: Hang on, we'll be right back!
translation.en: Hang on, we'll be right back!

translation.tag: Hardware is validated on startup and reconnection
translation.en: Hardware is validated on startup and reconnection

translation.tag: Have a piece of paper ready.
translation.en: Have a piece of paper ready.

translation.tag: Have your bed adjustment tool (screwdriver, hex-key, etc.) ready if your bed isn't adjusted with thumb wheels or some other built-in mechanism.
translation.en: Have your bed adjustment tool (screwdriver, hex-key, etc.) ready if your bed isn't adjusted with thumb wheels or some other built-in mechanism.

translation.tag: Heat bed before calibrating for accurate offset with thermal expansion.
translation.en: Heat bed before calibrating for accurate offset with thermal expansion.

translation.tag: HelixScreen is detecting your display orientation
translation.en: HelixScreen is detecting your display orientation

translation.tag: HelixScreen will integrate with your filament changer for multi-spool/color print operations.
translation.en: HelixScreen will integrate with your filament changer for multi-spool/color print operations.

translation.tag: Homing may still be running — response timed out
translation.en: Homing may still be running — response timed out

translation.tag: If Moonraker is local or your screen is attached to the printer directly, we'll connect automatically
translation.en: If Moonraker is local or your screen is attached to the printer directly, we'll connect automatically

translation.tag: Ignore the click that fires when you lift after scrolling
translation.en: Ignore the click that fires when you lift after scrolling

translation.tag: Input shaping reduces ringing and ghosting artifacts caused by printer vibrations during fast movements.
translation.en: Input shaping reduces ringing and ghosting artifacts caused by printer vibrations during fast movements.

translation.tag: Input shaping reduces vibration artifacts (ringing) in your prints.
translation.en: Input shaping reduces vibration artifacts (ringing) in your prints.

translation.tag: Install the HelixPrint plugin to enable fast G-code modifications. Run this command via SSH on your printer:
translation.en: Install the HelixPrint plugin to enable fast G-code modifications. Run this command via SSH on your printer:

translation.tag: Install the timelapse plugin via SSH,\nthen tap \"Check Again\".
translation.en: Install the timelapse plugin via SSH,\nthen tap \"Check Again\".

translation.tag: Join the HelixScreen community on Discord for discussion, tips, troubleshooting help, and feature requests.
translation.en: Join the HelixScreen community on Discord for discussion, tips, troubleshooting help, and feature requests.

translation.tag: Klipper firmware has disconnected from the host. Try restarting Klipper or performing a firmware restart.
translation.en: Klipper firmware has disconnected from the host. Try restarting Klipper or performing a firmware restart.

translation.tag: Klipper has entered an error state. This is typically caused by an MCU connection failure or configuration error. Try a firmware restart.
translation.en: Klipper has entered an error state. This is typically caused by an MCU connection failure or configuration error. Try a firmware restart.

translation.tag: Klipper has entered shutdown state. This may be due to an emergency stop, thermal runaway, or configuration error.
translation.en: Klipper has entered shutdown state. This may be due to an emergency stop, thermal runaway, or configuration error.

translation.tag: Klipper will restart to apply changes
translation.en: Klipper will restart to apply changes

translation.tag: Klipper will restart to apply changes.
translation.en: Klipper will restart to apply changes.

translation.tag: Klipper will restart to apply new settings.
translation.en: Klipper will restart to apply new settings.

translation.tag: LEDs controlled by the light button
translation.en: LEDs controlled by the light button

translation.tag: Layer mode captures one frame per layer change. Best for most prints.
translation.en: Layer mode captures one frame per layer change. Best for most prints.

translation.tag: Load may still be running — response timed out
translation.en: Load may still be running — response timed out

translation.tag: Load the required filaments or start anyway?
translation.en: Load the required filaments or start anyway?

translation.tag: Lost connection during print — try again
translation.en: Lost connection during print — try again

translation.tag: MCU, host, and auxiliary temperature monitoring
translation.en: MCU, host, and auxiliary temperature monitoring

translation.tag: Macro may still be running — response timed out
translation.en: Macro may still be running — response timed out

translation.tag: Macro to cancel an active print
translation.en: Macro to cancel an active print

translation.tag: Macro to load filament into extruder
translation.en: Macro to load filament into extruder

translation.tag: Macro to pause an active print
translation.en: Macro to pause an active print

translation.tag: Macro to resume a paused print
translation.en: Macro to resume a paused print

translation.tag: Macro to unload filament from extruder
translation.en: Macro to unload filament from extruder

translation.tag: Make bed mesh and QGL skippable
translation.en: Make bed mesh and QGL skippable

translation.tag: Map to closest colors with matching material
translation.en: Map to closest colors with matching material

translation.tag: Match your typical print fan speed
translation.en: Match your typical print fan speed

translation.tag: Measure and compare belt path frequencies
translation.en: Measure and compare belt path frequencies

translation.tag: Moonraker restarted but Spoolman not connected. Check server.
translation.en: Moonraker restarted but Spoolman not connected. Check server.

translation.tag: More points = more accurate, but takes longer.
translation.en: More points = more accurate, but takes longer.

translation.tag: Move paper back and forth while adjusting. Stop when paper catches slightly but still slides.
translation.en: Move paper back and forth while adjusting. Stop when paper catches slightly but still slides.

translation.tag: Moves the print head to measure vibration frequencies on each axis. Takes 2-3 minutes. The printer will make noise — this is normal.
translation.en: Moves the print head to measure vibration frequencies on each axis. Takes 2-3 minutes. The printer will make noise — this is normal.

translation.tag: Named actions in the LED control panel (long-press).
translation.en: Named actions in the LED control panel (long-press).

translation.tag: No Bluetooth printer selected — pick one in settings
translation.en: No Bluetooth printer selected — pick one in settings

translation.tag: No LED macros detected on your printer.
translation.en: No LED macros detected on your printer.

translation.tag: No LED macros detected on your printer. Add Klipper macros for LED control first.
translation.en: No LED macros detected on your printer. Add Klipper macros for LED control first.

translation.tag: No camera — use USB barcode scanner
translation.en: No camera — use USB barcode scanner

translation.tag: No changes selected.\n\nClick Cancel to close.
translation.en: No changes selected.\n\nClick Cancel to close.

translation.tag: No dryer available. Store filament in a sealed dry box with desiccant for best results.
translation.en: No dryer available. Store filament in a sealed dry box with desiccant for best results.

translation.tag: No images found on USB drive
translation.en: No images found on USB drive

translation.tag: No light configured. Set up in Settings > LED Settings.
translation.en: No light configured. Set up in Settings > LED Settings.

translation.tag: No network. Scan QR code to report on your phone.
translation.en: No network. Scan QR code to report on your phone.

translation.tag: No objects defined for this print
translation.en: No objects defined for this print

translation.tag: No printer configured — check printer settings
translation.en: No printer configured — check printer settings

translation.tag: No spools found — tap to retry
translation.en: No spools found — tap to retry

translation.tag: No webcam detected.\nA webcam is required for timelapse.
translation.en: No webcam detected.\nA webcam is required for timelapse.

translation.tag: On and Off macros must be different
translation.en: On and Off macros must be different

translation.tag: Optimizes temperature control for stable, consistent heating.
translation.en: Optimizes temperature control for stable, consistent heating.

translation.tag: Optional - select your main lighting source, or skip if your printer doesn't have one
translation.en: Optional - select your main lighting source, or skip if your printer doesn't have one

translation.tag: Override auto-detection if your chamber sensor or heater isn't named 'chamber'.
translation.en: Override auto-detection if your chamber sensor or heater isn't named 'chamber'.

translation.tag: Pairing did not complete — the scanner did not bond. Try turning it off and on, then tap Pair again.
translation.en: Pairing did not complete — the scanner did not bond. Try turning it off and on, then tap Pair again.

translation.tag: Password is required for secured networks
translation.en: Password is required for secured networks

translation.tag: Pixels before a press becomes a scroll (lower = scrolls engage sooner)
translation.en: Pixels before a press becomes a scroll (lower = scrolls engage sooner)

translation.tag: Place image files (PNG, JPEG, BMP, GIF) in config/custom_images/. Max size: 2048×2048 pixels.
translation.en: Place image files (PNG, JPEG, BMP, GIF) in config/custom_images/. Max size: 2048×2048 pixels.

translation.tag: Place plugins in the plugins directory to extend HelixScreen
translation.en: Place plugins in the plugins directory to extend HelixScreen

translation.tag: Please enter an IP address or hostname.
translation.en: Please enter an IP address or hostname.

translation.tag: Please wait while the printer homes and probes.
translation.en: Please wait while the printer homes and probes.

translation.tag: Please wait while the printer probes each screw position.
translation.en: Please wait while the printer probes each screw position.

translation.tag: Plugin not responding after restart.\nIt may need more time to load.
translation.en: Plugin not responding after restart.\nIt may need more time to load.

translation.tag: Plugins are discovered on application startup
translation.en: Plugins are discovered on application startup

translation.tag: Point camera at QR code on spool
translation.en: Point camera at QR code on spool

translation.tag: Power off the printer or screen
translation.en: Power off the printer or screen

translation.tag: Print server rejected the job — check printer status
translation.en: Print server rejected the job — check printer status

translation.tag: Printer didn't respond — make sure it's on and in range
translation.en: Printer didn't respond — make sure it's on and in range

translation.tag: Printer doesn't expose the expected service — wrong device?
translation.en: Printer doesn't expose the expected service — wrong device?

translation.tag: Printer is not paired — pair it first
translation.en: Printer is not paired — pair it first

translation.tag: Printers, AMS, fans, sensors, and LEDs
translation.en: Printers, AMS, fans, sensors, and LEDs

translation.tag: Printing with the wrong material can cause clogs, poor adhesion, or failed prints.
translation.en: Printing with the wrong material can cause clogs, poor adhesion, or failed prints.

translation.tag: Probe controls, accuracy test, and settings
translation.en: Probe controls, accuracy test, and settings

translation.tag: Purge may still be running — response timed out
translation.en: Purge may still be running — response timed out

translation.tag: QGL may still be running — response timed out
translation.en: QGL may still be running — response timed out

translation.tag: Reboot failed — host is still reachable
translation.en: Reboot failed — host is still reachable

translation.tag: Recalibrate or view detailed results anytime in Settings.
translation.en: Recalibrate or view detailed results anytime in Settings.

translation.tag: Reduce vibration artifacts like ringing and ghosting
translation.en: Reduce vibration artifacts like ringing and ghosting

translation.tag: Release all stepper motors. Position will be lost.
translation.en: Release all stepper motors. Position will be lost.

translation.tag: Reset all settings and restart wizard
translation.en: Reset all settings and restart wizard

translation.tag: Retract may still be running — response timed out
translation.en: Retract may still be running — response timed out

translation.tag: Review your configuration below, then click Finish to save
translation.en: Review your configuration below, then click Finish to save

translation.tag: Run a Klipper macro when preheating this material
translation.en: Run a Klipper macro when preheating this material

translation.tag: Save changes to persist them across restarts?
translation.en: Save changes to persist them across restarts?

translation.tag: Saves to Klipper config and restarts firmware.
translation.en: Saves to Klipper config and restarts firmware.

translation.tag: Saving will restart Klipper and CANCEL any active print!
translation.en: Saving will restart Klipper and CANCEL any active print!

translation.tag: Scan and select a Bluetooth printer first
translation.en: Scan and select a Bluetooth printer first

translation.tag: Scanner bonded but didn't attach as a keyboard. Try turning the scanner off and on, then tap Pair again. If that fails, add ClassicBondedOnly=false to /etc/bluetooth/input.conf.
translation.en: Scanner bonded but didn't attach as a keyboard. Try turning the scanner off and on, then tap Pair again. If that fails, add ClassicBondedOnly=false to /etc/bluetooth/input.conf.

translation.tag: Screen dims to lower brightness after period of inactivity
translation.en: Screen dims to lower brightness after period of inactivity

translation.tag: Screen sleeps after the selected period of inactivity
translation.en: Screen sleeps after the selected period of inactivity

translation.tag: See exactly what data will be sent
translation.en: See exactly what data will be sent

translation.tag: See the quick tour of HelixScreen again
translation.en: See the quick tour of HelixScreen again

translation.tag: Select 'None' if you don't have a filament sensor, or if you don't want to pause on runout.
translation.en: Select 'None' if you don't have a filament sensor, or if you don't want to pause on runout.

translation.tag: Select a filament slot to load
translation.en: Select a filament slot to load

translation.tag: Select the heaters Klipper uses for your bed and hotend
translation.en: Select the heaters Klipper uses for your bed and hotend

translation.tag: Select which devices the home screen power button controls
translation.en: Select which devices the home screen power button controls

translation.tag: Select which sensor triggers pause on filament runout
translation.en: Select which sensor triggers pause on filament runout

translation.tag: Send this crash report to help improve HelixScreen.
translation.en: Send this crash report to help improve HelixScreen.

translation.tag: Separate on/off macros. HelixScreen tracks the state.
translation.en: Separate on/off macros. HelixScreen tracks the state.

translation.tag: Set local timezone for time display
translation.en: Set local timezone for time display

translation.tag: Set up your label printer in Settings
translation.en: Set up your label printer in Settings

translation.tag: Share anonymous usage statistics to help us make HelixScreen better. No personal data is ever collected.
translation.en: Share anonymous usage statistics to help us make HelixScreen better. No personal data is ever collected.

translation.tag: Share this code in Discord or support:
translation.en: Share this code in Discord or support:

translation.tag: Show a confirmation dialog when tapping a macro
translation.en: Show a confirmation dialog when tapping a macro

translation.tag: Show printer icon in navigation bar
translation.en: Show printer icon in navigation bar

translation.tag: Show text labels on icon-only home screen widgets
translation.en: Show text labels on icon-only home screen widgets

translation.tag: Show whatever curves you last had visible on the full graph.
translation.en: Show whatever curves you last had visible on the full graph.

translation.tag: Shutdown failed — host is still reachable
translation.en: Shutdown failed — host is still reachable

translation.tag: Single toggle macro. State is not tracked.
translation.en: Single toggle macro. State is not tracked.

translation.tag: Sleep adjusted to match dim timeout
translation.en: Sleep adjusted to match dim timeout

translation.tag: Small labels help keep controls calm and focused.
translation.en: Small labels help keep controls calm and focused.

translation.tag: Some settings will take effect after restart.
translation.en: Some settings will take effect after restart.

translation.tag: Space Debris mod by Markus 'Captain' Kaarlonen
translation.en: Space Debris mod by Markus 'Captain' Kaarlonen

translation.tag: Spoolman unavailable — filament weights may be stale
translation.en: Spoolman unavailable — filament weights may be stale

translation.tag: Stops all motion. Requires firmware restart.
translation.en: Stops all motion. Requires firmware restart.

translation.tag: Suppress raw debug output from printer firmware modules
translation.en: Suppress raw debug output from printer firmware modules

translation.tag: Surfaces inherit app background tokens for light and dark modes.
translation.en: Surfaces inherit app background tokens for light and dark modes.

translation.tag: Switch between light and dark themes
translation.en: Switch between light and dark themes

translation.tag: Switching heater control to MPC. Klipper will restart.
translation.en: Switching heater control to MPC. Klipper will restart.

translation.tag: Switching to MPC requires a config change and Klipper restart.
translation.en: Switching to MPC requires a config change and Klipper restart.

translation.tag: Tap again to confirm this orientation
translation.en: Tap again to confirm this orientation

translation.tag: Tap anywhere if this text is right-side up
translation.en: Tap anywhere if this text is right-side up

translation.tag: Tap the crosshair (point %1$d of 3) \xe2\x80\x94 touch %2$d of %3$d
translation.en: Tap the crosshair (point %1$d of 3) \xe2\x80\x94 touch %2$d of %3$d

translation.tag: Temporary adjustment for this print, unless saved on Controls panel
translation.en: Temporary adjustment for this print, unless saved on Controls panel

translation.tag: Thanks! Anonymous usage data helps improve HelixScreen.
translation.en: Thanks! Anonymous usage data helps improve HelixScreen.

translation.tag: Thanks! TOTALLY anonymous usage data helps improve HelixScreen.
translation.en: Thanks! TOTALLY anonymous usage data helps improve HelixScreen.

translation.tag: The HelixPrint plugin enables fast G-code modifications directly on your printer—like skipping bed mesh for quick reprints.
translation.en: The HelixPrint plugin enables fast G-code modifications directly on your printer—like skipping bed mesh for quick reprints.

translation.tag: The animated screensaver has been turned off on this device to prevent it from interfering with prints. You can re-enable it in Settings > Display.
translation.en: The animated screensaver has been turned off on this device to prevent it from interfering with prints. You can re-enable it in Settings > Display.

translation.tag: The heater will cycle on and off several times.
translation.en: The heater will cycle on and off several times.

translation.tag: The runout sensor indicates no filament is loaded. Start print anyway?
translation.en: The runout sensor indicates no filament is loaded. Start print anyway?

translation.tag: The toolhead sensor indicates filament is already loaded. Proceed with load anyway?
translation.en: The toolhead sensor indicates filament is already loaded. Proceed with load anyway?

translation.tag: The toolhead sensor indicates no filament is present. Proceed with unload anyway?
translation.en: The toolhead sensor indicates no filament is present. Proceed with unload anyway?

translation.tag: These tools have incompatible materials loaded:
translation.en: These tools have incompatible materials loaded:

translation.tag: These tools have no matching filament loaded:
translation.en: These tools have no matching filament loaded:

translation.tag: This calibration uses the paper friction method to set your Z-offset.
translation.en: This calibration uses the paper friction method to set your Z-offset.

translation.tag: This file was sliced for {} but {} is loaded.
translation.en: This file was sliced for {} but {} is loaded.

translation.tag: This is exactly the data that will be sent
translation.en: This is exactly the data that will be sent

translation.tag: This is what data would be sent if enabled
translation.en: This is what data would be sent if enabled

translation.tag: This may take up to 30 seconds
translation.en: This may take up to 30 seconds

translation.tag: This plugin lets HelixScreen control print start options like bed mesh and QGL. Once installed, use Configure PRINT_START below to enable optional steps.
translation.en: This plugin lets HelixScreen control print start options like bed mesh and QGL. Once installed, use Configure PRINT_START below to enable optional steps.

translation.tag: This print needs about %.0fg but the spool has about %.0fg remaining. Start anyway?
translation.en: This print needs about %.0fg but the spool has about %.0fg remaining. Start anyway?

translation.tag: This tool probes each bed screw and tells you how much to adjust.
translation.en: This tool probes each bed screw and tells you how much to adjust.

translation.tag: This will apply the Z-offset to your endstop and restart Klipper to save the configuration. The printer will briefly disconnect.
translation.en: This will apply the Z-offset to your endstop and restart Klipper to save the configuration. The printer will briefly disconnect.

translation.tag: This will apply the Z-offset to your probe and restart Klipper to save the configuration. The printer will briefly disconnect.
translation.en: This will apply the Z-offset to your probe and restart Klipper to save the configuration. The printer will briefly disconnect.

translation.tag: This will collect system info, logs, settings, and printer data to help diagnose issues. No passwords or sensitive data will be included.
translation.en: This will collect system info, logs, settings, and printer data to help diagnose issues. No passwords or sensitive data will be included.

translation.tag: This will immediately halt all printer operations. The printer will require a restart to resume.
translation.en: This will immediately halt all printer operations. The printer will require a restart to resume.

translation.tag: This will remove all custom pages and restore the default widget layout.
translation.en: This will remove all custom pages and restore the default widget layout.

translation.tag: This will remove all entries from the display.
translation.en: This will remove all entries from the display.

translation.tag: This will remove the Spoolman configuration from Moonraker and restart the service.
translation.en: This will remove the Spoolman configuration from Moonraker and restart the service.

translation.tag: This will reset all settings to defaults. This action cannot be undone.
translation.en: This will reset all settings to defaults. This action cannot be undone.

translation.tag: This will restart Klipper firmware. Any active operations will be interrupted.
translation.en: This will restart Klipper firmware. Any active operations will be interrupted.

translation.tag: Time to wait before escalating to emergency stop
translation.en: Time to wait before escalating to emergency stop

translation.tag: Touch screen to wake from sleep
translation.en: Touch screen to wake from sleep

translation.tag: Touch the target (point %1$d of 3) \xe2\x80\x94 touch %2$d of %3$d
translation.en: Touch the target (point %1$d of 3) \xe2\x80\x94 touch %2$d of %3$d

translation.tag: Try adjusting your search or filters
translation.en: Try adjusting your search or filters

translation.tag: Tuning tower enabled - start a print to test
translation.en: Tuning tower enabled - start a print to test

translation.tag: Turn on LEDs when printer starts
translation.en: Turn on LEDs when printer starts

translation.tag: USB printer access denied — check permissions
translation.en: USB printer access denied — check permissions

translation.tag: Unload may still be running — response timed out
translation.en: Unload may still be running — response timed out

translation.tag: Unloading... click again to load slot {}
translation.en: Unloading... click again to load slot {}

translation.tag: Upload gcode files to get started
translation.en: Upload gcode files to get started

translation.tag: Use Android native keyboard for text input
translation.en: Use Android native keyboard for text input

translation.tag: Use printer type to select image
translation.en: Use printer type to select image

translation.tag: View print statistics and job history
translation.en: View print statistics and job history

translation.tag: Waiting for bed to reach temperature for accurate calibration.
translation.en: Waiting for bed to reach temperature for accurate calibration.

translation.tag: Weight data is synced from Spoolman to display remaining filament. Changes are also synced when prints start, pause, or complete.
translation.en: Weight data is synced from Spoolman to display remaining filament. Changes are also synced when prints start, pause, or complete.

translation.tag: When enabled, only the macro runs. When disabled, temperatures are set first, then the macro runs.
translation.en: When enabled, only the macro runs. When disabled, temperatures are set first, then the macro runs.

translation.tag: When starting a print, you'll be able to choose whether to run %s. This saves time when you've already done it recently or want more control over your print preparation.
translation.en: When starting a print, you'll be able to choose whether to run %s. This saves time when you've already done it recently or want more control over your print preparation.

translation.tag: X axis applied, but Y axis failed
translation.en: X axis applied, but Y axis failed

translation.tag: X jog blocked at bed edge
translation.en: X jog blocked at bed edge

translation.tag: Y jog blocked at bed edge
translation.en: Y jog blocked at bed edge

translation.tag:
You can now skip these operations when starting prints.

Look for the new options in the print details before starting each print.

A backup of your config was saved automatically.
translation.en:
You can now skip these operations when starting prints.

Look for the new options in the print details before starting each print.

A backup of your config was saved automatically.

translation.tag: You can skip this and calibrate later in Settings.
translation.en: You can skip this and calibrate later in Settings.

translation.tag: You have unsaved changes. Discard them?
translation.en: You have unsaved changes. Discard them?

translation.tag: Your PRINT_START macro will be updated to give you control over:\n\n
translation.en: Your PRINT_START macro will be updated to give you control over:\n\n

translation.tag: Your completed prints will appear here
translation.en: Your completed prints will appear here

translation.tag: Your print start is already fully configured!
translation.en: Your print start is already fully configured!

translation.tag: Your printer has an automatic filament changer
translation.en: Your printer has an automatic filament changer

translation.tag: Z probes for bed leveling and mesh generation
translation.en: Z probes for bed leveling and mesh generation

translation.tag: Z-Tilt may still be running — response timed out
translation.en: Z-Tilt may still be running — response timed out
Monitor for print abnormalities (K2 Plus camera-based)
Macros, G-code console, calibration tools (PID, input shaper, z-offset), firmware updates, and developer utilities.
Move the toolhead, home axes, level the bed, and fine-tune temperatures, fans, and other motion settings.
Long-press any tile to enter edit mode — rearrange, resize, remove, or add widgets, and add extra pages for your preferred layout.
Load, unload, and swap spools. View your multi-filament system at a glance, map colors to slots, and monitor runout sensors.
Tap any tile to open its full controls or toggle its state.
Monitor prints in progress — time remaining, current layer, and progress. Tap to pause, resume, or cancel the active job.
Network, display, sound, printer setup, and more. You can replay this tour anytime from Help & About.
Let's take a quick tour so you can find things fast.

translation.tag: v{} is available. Tap to update.
translation.en: v{} is available. Tap to update.

translation.tag: {} may cause unintended changes. Are you sure?
translation.en: {} may cause unintended changes. Are you sure?
